title: Creator Discovery Engine Input
description: Configure search parameters for finding social media creators by niche keyword, country, and follower range.

platform.title: Platform
platform.description: Social media platform to search creators on.

keyword.title: Keyword / Niche
keyword.description: Creator niche or keyword (e.g. 'parenting coach', 'fitness creator', 'career mentor'). This keyword is pre-processed upstream — the actor searches exactly as provided.

country.title: Country
country.description: Target country for the search (e.g. 'United States', 'Canada', 'Australia'). Leave blank to search worldwide.

minFollowers.title: Minimum Followers
minFollowers.description: Minimum follower/subscriber count. Creators below this threshold are filtered out.

maxFollowers.title: Maximum Followers
maxFollowers.description: Maximum follower/subscriber count. Creators above this threshold are filtered out.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of creator profiles to return in the dataset.
